narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Unrelenting demand for AI training and inference chips is driving massive revenue growth for leading semiconductor firms.
watchFor: China export controls expand to HBM

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The massive demand for weight-loss medications is driving significant growth for leading pharmaceutical leaders.

narratives.name: Cybersecurity Expansion
narratives.thesis: Rising digital threats and enterprise security consolidation are driving strong adoption of zero-trust and identity security platforms.

narratives.name: Yield-Driven Valuation Pressure
narratives.thesis: Rising Treasury yields driven by hot inflation prints are compressing the valuation multiples of high-growth semiconductor stocks.

narratives.name: Yield-Driven Valuation Pressure
narratives.thesis: Higher interest rates are creating volatility in bank earnings and compressing multiples.

narratives.name: Real-Yield Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Rising Treasury yields are making non-yielding assets like gold less attractive to investors.

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Major tech platforms are leveraging AI to optimize ad targeting and content delivery, driving revenue growth.

narratives.name: Consumer Value Rotation
narratives.thesis: Value-oriented shopping is gaining momentum as consumers seek affordability amidst macro uncertainty.

narratives.name: Healthcare Plan Scrutiny
narratives.thesis: Regulatory pressure and institutional de-risking are weighing on major healthcare insurers.

narratives.name: Agentic AI Integration
narratives.thesis: The next wave of software growth is being driven by the integration of autonomous AI agents into enterprise workflows.
watchFor: Slow enterprise adoption of AI agents

narratives.name: Internet Retail Volatility
narratives.thesis: E-commerce growth is facing pressure from shifting consumer habits and high valuation scrutiny.
watchFor: Consumer spending drop in retail sales

narratives.name: Geopolitical/Clean Energy Silver Play
narratives.thesis: Silver is benefiting from its dual role as a geopolitical hedge and a critical component in the clean energy transition.

narratives.name: Geopolitical Risk Hedge
narratives.thesis: Rising tensions in the Middle East are driving interest in defense-related aerospace stocks.

Technology.thesis: AI capex continues to drive massive demand for hardware, but hot inflation data is driving yields higher, pressuring high-multiple software and semiconductor valuations.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guidance lowered at next earnings

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Consumer spending is bifurcating, with value-seeking behavior rising while high-end internet retail faces valuation and growth headwinds.

Communication Services.thesis: AI leadership in search and content is providing a tailwind for major platforms, though regulatory and social friction remains a risk.

Industrials.thesis: Geopolitical instability in the Middle East is building, but direct impact on industrial orders has not yet materialized in price action.

Healthcare.thesis: The GLP-1 obesity drug revolution is a massive tailwind, but healthcare plans are facing regulatory and valuation scrutiny.
watchFor: Clinical trial safety concerns for GLP-1s

Financials.thesis: Rising yields and inflation fears are pressuring bank valuations and driving institutional de-risking.

Consumer Defensive.thesis: Consumers are rotating into value-oriented discount retailers as inflation and geopolitical uncertainty impact household budgets.

Precious Metals.thesis: Gold is facing headwinds from rising real yields, while silver finds support from geopolitical hedging and clean energy demand.
